message:
feat(demo_showcase): in-doc search with match navigation (bd-2lkz)

Implement search within the Docs page:
- `/` enters search mode with query input
- Incremental search finds matches in markdown content
- `n`/`N` navigates to next/previous match
- Viewport scrolls to center match in view
- Match count shown in header (e.g., "3/12")
- Search cleared when changing documents
- Context-sensitive hints update for search mode

Add comprehensive tests for search functionality.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
